data.title: Sigma Lithium Achieves Production Targets Amid Strategic Sales Withholding
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Sigma Lithium ( (TSE:SGML) ) is now available.

Sigma Lithium reported a 38% year-on-year increase in lithium oxide concentrate production for the second quarter of 2025, achieving 68,368 tonnes, slightly above their target. Despite a 62% decrease in sales revenue due to a strategic decision to withhold product amid price volatility, the company maintained low operating costs and advanced its plant expansion to double capacity, reinforcing its position in the lithium industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SGML) stock is a Buy with a C$18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sigma Lithium stock, see the TSE:SGML Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SGML Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SGML is a Neutral.

Sigma Lithium’s overall score is driven by its revenue growth and operational efficiency, as highlighted in the earnings call. However, profitability challenges, high debt levels, and valuation concerns weigh on the score. Technical indicators provide a mixed outlook, further influencing the overall assessment.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SGML stock, click here.

More about Sigma Lithium

Sigma Lithium Corporation is a leading global lithium producer focused on providing carbon-neutral, socially, and environmentally sustainable lithium concentrate. The company is dedicated to supporting the next generation of electric vehicles.

Average Trading Volume: 67,187

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$856.9M

data.title: Blackbird Critical Metals Corp. to Acquire Lir Life Sciences Inc.
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Gama Explorations, Inc. ( (TSE:BBRD) ) has shared an announcement.

Blackbird Critical Metals Corp., a company involved in the critical metals sector, has announced its plan to acquire Lir Life Sciences Inc. through a definitive share purchase agreement. This acquisition marks a significant shift for Blackbird as it represents a ‘Fundamental Change’ under the Canadian Securities Exchange’s policies. The transaction involves a share exchange and requires approval from both the CSE and Blackbird’s shareholders. Upon completion, Blackbird will continue under the name Lir Life Sciences Corp., indicating a strategic pivot towards life sciences. The acquisition is contingent on several conditions, including a private placement by Lir Life Sciences and a consolidation of Blackbird’s shares.

More about Gama Explorations, Inc.

Average Trading Volume: 6,795

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Ares Real Estate Reports July 2025 NAV Update
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Div Cap Dvs Ppt Shs -A- ( (ZDPFAX) ) has issued an update.

On August 15, 2025, Ares Real Estate Income Trust Inc. released an update on its net asset value (NAV) and portfolio as of July 31, 2025. The company reported a total investment in real estate properties of approximately $6.2 billion, with a leverage ratio of 35.8%. The NAV per share increased slightly from $7.7262 in June to $7.7835 in July. The company also announced an increase in monthly gross distributions per share to $0.03450, effective July 2025. This update highlights the company’s stable financial position and its strategic focus on maintaining a diversified real estate portfolio across the U.S., which could positively impact its stakeholders.

data.title: SEGG Media Delays Quarterly Report Filing
data.description:
SEGG Media ( (SEGG) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

SEGG Media, operating under the name Lottery.com Inc., has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending June 30, 2025. The delay is attributed to challenges in completing and obtaining necessary financial and reporting information without incurring unreasonable effort and expense. The company anticipates that the report will be filed within five days following the original due date. There are no expected significant changes in financial results from the previous year, and the company has included forward-looking statements regarding its ability to meet the new filing timeline. The notification is signed by Robert J. Stubblefield, the Chief Financial Officer, indicating ongoing compliance efforts.

More about SEGG Media

data.description:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from Western Metallica Resources Corp. ( (TSE:WMS) ).

Western Metallica Resources Corp. has announced the appointment of Roxanne Gelineau as a new director, bringing her extensive experience in accounting and administration to the company. This change follows the resignation of Joaquin Merino as a director, and the company expressed gratitude for his contributions. The appointment of Ms. Gelineau is expected to bolster the company’s financial management and operational support, potentially enhancing its strategic positioning in the mineral exploration industry.

More about Western Metallica Resources Corp.

Western Metallica Resources Corp. is a mineral resource exploration company based in Toronto, Ontario, and trades on the TSXV under the symbol WMS. The company focuses on mineral exploration projects, including its wholly-owned Nueva Celti Copper Property in Andalusia, Spain, and three gold projects in the Navelgas Gold Belt in Asturias, Spain.

data.title: First Interstate BancSystem Appoints New Board Director
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

First Interstate Bancsystem ( (FIBK) ) has issued an announcement.

On August 13, 2025, First Interstate BancSystem, Inc. appointed Mr. Michael L. Scudder as a Class I director on its Board, with his term set to expire at the 2028 annual meeting of shareholders. Mr. Scudder, who retired as Executive Chairman of Old National Bancorp in January 2024, brings extensive experience from his 38-year career in commercial banking, including leadership roles at First Midwest Bancorp. His appointment fills a vacancy created by the Board’s decision to expand its size, and he is deemed independent under NASDAQ rules. Mr. Scudder will receive compensation similar to other non-employee directors and has not yet been assigned to any committees.

The most recent analyst rating on (FIBK) stock is a Sell with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on First Interstate Bancsystem stock, see the FIBK Stock Forecast page.

First Interstate Bancsystem’s strong financial performance and positive earnings call sentiment are the primary drivers of its stock score. The attractive valuation and stable technical indicators further support the score, though caution is warranted due to challenges in loan volumes and criticized loans.

data.title: Vaxart Schedules Fireside Chat on Stock Split
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from Vaxart ( (VXRT) ) is now available.

On August 14, 2025, Vaxart announced a virtual stockholder fireside chat scheduled for August 20, 2025, to discuss a reverse stock split proposal. Supported by proxy advisory firms ISS and Glass Lewis, the proposal aims to regain Nasdaq compliance. The event will allow stockholders to engage directly with Vaxart’s management and address frequently asked questions.

The most recent analyst rating on (VXRT) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vaxart stock, see the VXRT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VXRT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VXRT is a Neutral.

Vaxart’s overall stock score reflects ongoing financial struggles and valuation challenges, offset by positive developments in clinical trials and strategic initiatives. Significant risks remain from operational losses and potential NASDAQ delisting.

To see Spark’s full report on VXRT stock, click here.

More about Vaxart

Vaxart is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing oral recombinant vaccines using its proprietary delivery platform. The company’s vaccines are designed to be administered as pills, which can be stored and shipped without refrigeration, eliminating the risk of needle-stick injury. Vaxart’s development programs include vaccines for coronavirus, norovirus, influenza, and a therapeutic vaccine for human papillomavirus (HPV).

data.title: Credissential Unveils New Features for Enhanced Security and Payment Processing
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Axiom Capital Advisors ( (TSE:WHIP) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Credissential Inc. announced the development of two new features for its Antenna Platform: SecureVault Auto-Destruct and an Apple Wallet enabled QR code. These advancements aim to enhance data protection and streamline cashless transactions, addressing the growing demand for secure file transfer and payment processing. The SecureVault Auto-Destruct feature will allow users to automatically delete transferred files from Antenna servers, reducing security risks and aiding compliance with data retention policies. The Apple Wallet integration will facilitate seamless payment processing, expanding the platform’s functionality. These developments are expected to integrate with Antenna’s existing security protocols, with full implementation anticipated after the acquisition by Codeifai Limited.

More about Axiom Capital Advisors

Credissential is an AI-powered financial services software developer, focusing on developing and commercializing flagship products such as Credissential, Dealer flow, CoinCMPLY, and Antenna Transfer.

Magee, who served the bank for 38 years in various leadership roles, including CEO and Chairman, was remembered for his strong leadership and dedication, leaving a significant impact on the bank’s operations and community.
